metadata.instruction: Open Task ID 43.xlsx in Documents > Task 43 folder, create a bar chart where the x-axis is "Book Title" and the y-axis is the "Days to Finish". The title of the chart is "Summer Reading
metadata.context: I am tracking all the books I've read in an excel sheet. I have columns for "Book Title", "# Days to Finish", and "Rating (1-10)". I want to make a bar chart for how many days I took to read all the books.
